primary_text:
How far does your dinner travel before it reaches your plate?

Supermarket beef averages 2,400km. Then sits in cold storage for 14-21 days.

FarmThru delivers regenerative meat and dairy from 50+ farms across NSW. Paddock to your door in 2-3 days. Sydney, Central Coast and Wollongong.

2,000+ families already get their weekly shop this way.

Join the waitlist. See why your neighbours switched.
headline: Your Neighbours Already Switched
description: 2,000+ Sydney families get regenerative food delivered in 2-3 days. Not 14-21 days cold storage.
creative_brief: Question hook triggers curiosity about food provenance. Stack the comparison data (2,400km vs local, 14-21 days vs 2-3 days), then pivot to social proof with local belonging cue. 'Your neighbours' creates proximity and FOMO without hype.
